# flox usage guide for AI agents

`flox` is a multi-source video aggregator on **Next.js 16 App Router + React 19**.
Search is an **Edge SSE fan-out** that fires one `fetch` per enabled source and
streams each source's results as it replies; playback runs through a custom
`hls.js` engine with a 4-layer M3U8 ad filter. It is **server-stateless**: no
database, no Cloudflare binding, no accounts — every persisted thing lives in the
browser's `localStorage` (Zustand persist).

Primary docs:

- README: ./README.md
- Design spec (authoritative): ./DESIGN.md
- Env template: ./.env.example
- Types: ./src/lib/types/index.ts

Part of the `@cdlab/projects-monorepo`; run all commands from the repo root with
`pnpm --filter @cdlab/flox <script>`.

## What it is

- **Two halves.** Server = stateless Edge routes under `src/app/api/*` (all
  `export const runtime = 'edge'`) that only fan out / proxy / probe upstream.
  Client = React UI holding ALL durable state in `localStorage` via Zustand.
- **No bindings, no DB.** There is **no `wrangler.jsonc`** and no KV/D1/R2/DO.
  Deploy target is Cloudflare Pages via `@cloudflare/next-on-pages` (`build:cf`);
  `output: 'standalone'` also makes it a runnable Node/Docker server.
- **Sources ship EMPTY.** `DEFAULT_SOURCES` / `PREMIUM_SOURCES` are `[]`. The app
  is inert until the user imports the remote curated list or adds sources.

## Parallel search pipeline

Edge route `src/app/api/search-parallel/route.ts` (`POST { query, sources, page }`):

1. validate → SSE `error` + close on empty query / empty sources (route has NO
   built-in sources; the client must supply them).
2. emit `start { totalSources }`.
3. `Promise.all`: one `fetch` per source (`searchVideos`, timed with
   `performance.now()` for `latency`). Unbounded fan-out — no server pool.
4. source resolves → SSE `videos` (+ latency) + `progress`; source fails →
   `progress` only.
5. all settled → SSE `complete`.

Frame types: `start | videos | progress | complete | error`. Headers:
`text/event-stream`, `no-cache`, `keep-alive`.

Client (`src/lib/hooks/useParallelSearch.ts` + `src/lib/utils/search-stream.ts`):

- TanStack `useMutation`; if no sources passed, assembles them from
  `useSettingsStore` (`.sources` + enabled `.subscriptions`). Uses an
  `AbortController` — a new search aborts the prior one.
- `processSearchStream` parses SSE line-by-line, filters each video with
  `hasMinimumMatch` + scores with `calculateRelevanceScore`.
- **Watchdog invariant:** a 3s no-progress timer auto-fires `onComplete()` so a
  hung source can't stall the UI.
- Merges via `binaryInsertVideos` (sorted insert); on complete → `sortVideos` →
  push to search cache.

## Source registry (src/lib/api/*)

- `VideoSource` = `{ id, name, baseUrl, searchPath, detailPath, headers?, enabled,
  priority, group: 'normal'|'premium' }`.
- `client.ts` re-exports `searchVideos` / `getVideoDetail`. `search-api.ts` hits
  MacCMS JSON `${baseUrl}${searchPath}?ac=detail&wd=&pg=` (UA-spoofed
  `Mozilla/5.0`). `detail-api.ts` parses `$$$`-delimited multi-play-sources.
- Curated 38+ list is REMOTE:
  `BUILTIN_SOURCES_URL = https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/WuChenDi/static/flox/sources-link-all.json`,
  fetched **through `/api/proxy`** on one-click import (CORS dodge).

## Proxy & ad filter

- `/api/proxy?url=` (`src/app/api/proxy/route.ts`): forwards ONLY `cookie`/`range`
  upstream; detects M3U8 by content-type / `.m3u8` / body sniff (`#EXTM3U`);
  rewrites manifest segment URLs back through itself (`processM3u8Content`); adds
  CORS to every response; strips `content-encoding/length/transfer-encoding`.
- `filterM3u8Ad()` (`src/lib/utils/m3u8-utils.ts`), gated by `adFilterMode`
  (`off|keyword|heuristic|aggressive`): (1) heuristic block scoring over
  DISCONTINUITY blocks, (2) SCTE-35 `#EXT-X-CUE-OUT…IN` state machine, (3) keyword
  match, (4) aggressive = strip ALL `#EXT-X-DISCONTINUITY`. Runs both in the proxy
  and in the client hls.js loader.

## Custom HLS player (src/components/player/)

- `VideoPlayer.tsx` dispatches on `playerEngine` (`veplayer|native`): `FloxPlayer`
  (Volcengine VePlayer) vs `CustomVideoPlayer` → `DesktopVideoPlayer` → `desktop/*`.
- State: `hooks/useDesktopPlayerState.ts` + `useDesktopPlayerLogic.ts` →
  `refs`/`data`/`actions` over `hooks/desktop/*`.
- `hooks/useHlsPlayer.ts` (HLS core): subclasses hls.js `DefaultLoader` to run
  `filterM3u8Ad` on manifest/level responses (FORCES hls.js when ad filter is on,
  even with native HLS); HEVC/H.264 level-locking on `MANIFEST_PARSED`; iOS/native
  path rebuilds filtered playlists as blob URLs with `/api/proxy` + 8s-timeout
  fallback; capped fatal-error recovery (MAX_RETRIES=3); revokes blob URLs on
  teardown.

## Storage model (src/lib/store/*)

- All persistence = browser `localStorage` via Zustand persist, keys `flox:<scope>`.
- `create-persisted-store.ts` auto-registers each store in `registry.ts`; entries
  carry `includeInBackup` (default true). `store/init.ts` (imported by
  `layout.tsx`) force-registers all stores so global reset/export never misses one.
- Registry ops: `resetAllStores`, `exportAllStores`/`importAllStores` (backup-only),
  `clearAppCaches` (wipes segment Cache Storage + metadata index).
- Persisted keys: `flox:settings`, `flox:favorites`, `flox:history`,
  `flox:watch-later`, `flox:search-history`, `flox:tag-orders`, `flox:unlock` —
  several have a `:premium` sibling. `flox:unlock` is `includeInBackup: false`.
- UI-only (non-persisted): `sidebar-store`, `header-reset-store`.

## Password gate & premium (src/components/{PasswordGate,premium}/)

- `PasswordGate` wraps the app; fetches `/api/config` for status, hashes the
  password client-side (`hashPasswordFn`), verifies via `POST /api/config`
  (`verifyPasswordFn` vs `ACCESS_PASSWORD`). Env value NEVER leaves the server.
- `flox:unlock` is `includeInBackup:false` so an exported settings file can't
  replay-unlock. This is casual gating, NOT auth (no accounts).
- Premium isolation (`usePremiumContent`) keeps sources/history/favorites
  separate; `/player?premium=1` selects the premium history bucket.

## Config & routes (.env.example, src/app/api/*)

- Env only (no bindings/secrets): `ACCESS_PASSWORD`, `PERSIST_PASSWORD`,
  `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUBSCRIPTION_SOURCES` (also read as `SUBSCRIPTION_SOURCES`),
  `AD_KEYWORDS`, `AD_KEYWORDS_FILE`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_{NAME,TITLE,DESCRIPTION}`.
- Edge routes: `search-parallel`, `proxy`, `probe-resolution` (batch cap 100,
  6-worker pool), `detail`, `check-source`, `ping`, `config`,
  `douban/{filter,image,ranking,recommend,suggest,tags}`, `premium/{category,types}`.
- Pages: `/`, `/player`, `/ranking`, `/settings`, `/premium`, `/premium/settings`.
- `src/middleware.ts` applies CORS to `/api/*` (allow-list `floxx.pages.dev`,
  `flox.localhost:3355`).

## Gotchas for agents

- **Sources are empty by default** — nothing searches until the curated list is
  imported (via `/api/proxy`) or sources are added. Don't treat `[]` as a bug.
- **No `wrangler.jsonc`, no bindings, no DB.** Don't add KV/D1/R2 wiring; all
  state is `localStorage`. Server routes are stateless Edge handlers.
- **Keep `src/middleware.ts` named `middleware.ts`** — Next 16 wants `proxy.ts`
  but `next-on-pages` doesn't support it yet (see the file's comment).
- **Every `src/app/api/*` route MUST stay `runtime = 'edge'`.** No `fs` in edge
  routes — `AD_KEYWORDS_FILE` is read only in the Node root `layout.tsx`.
- **Two live domains disagree:** middleware/README use `floxx.pages.dev`
  (double-x); `layout.tsx` metadata uses `flox.pages.dev` (single-x). Don't
  "fix" one without checking OG + CORS impact.
- **Don't reorder the search pipeline or SSE frame shapes** without reading
  DESIGN §3 — the client parser and the 3s watchdog depend on them.
- **`build` is `next build --webpack`** — Turbopack is intentionally not used.
- **No test suite exists** — there is no `test` script.

## Common commands

```bash
pnpm --filter @cdlab/flox dev          # http://flox.localhost:3355 (or: pnpm dev:flox)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/flox build        # next build --webpack (NOT Turbopack)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/flox build:cf     # next-on-pages (Cloudflare Pages build)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/flox lint         # next lint
pnpm --filter @cdlab/flox typecheck    # tsc --noEmit
```
